# Glossary {.unnumbered #sec-glossary}

<!-- 
# Read the glossary from the YAML file

# Iterate over the terms in the glossary and print them

``` -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

import yaml

with open("glossary.yml", "r") as f:
    glossary = yaml.safe_load(f)

for term in sorted(glossary.keys()):
    print(f"## {term} \n\n{glossary[term]}\n\n")
```
